commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ec370d32845d9f3b08b25c1c49b22d39c061c791)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds core-owned durable session goals with model tools, `/goal` command handling, session-state persistence, mutation tracking, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +610, Tests +212, Docs +1. Total +823 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; for the compatibility risk, source inspection gives a high-confidence path through current plugin slot projection plus the PR's unvalidated `entry.goal` read.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a maintainer compatibility/product decision around claiming a core persisted session slot, not a safe automatic repair lane.

target.title: feat: add core session goals
target.body:
## Summary

- Replaces #85723 with core-owned session goals instead of a plugin/lease extension surface.
- Persists goals on SessionEntry, exposes get_goal/create_goal/update_goal model tools, and adds native/text /goal controls.
- Wires coding tool catalog, mutation replay tracking, reset cleanup, docs, and focused regression coverage.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Core-owned thread/session goals with model tools and /goal controls, replacing plugin-owned PR #85723.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/config/sessions/goals.ts src/config/sessions/goals.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.ts src/agents/tool-mutation.ts src/agents/tool-mutation.test.ts src/agents/tool-catalog.test.ts src/agents/tools/goal-tools.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-goal.ts docs/tools/slash-commands.md
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/config/sessions/goals.ts src/config/sessions/goals.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.ts src/agents/tool-mutation.ts src/agents/tool-mutation.test.ts src/agents/tool-catalog.test.ts src/agents/tools/goal-tools.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-goal.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.ts src/agents/tool-catalog.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.ts src/auto-reply/commands-registry.shared.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-handlers.runtime.ts src/config/sessions.ts src/config/sessions/types.ts src/plugins/session-entry-slot-keys.ts
- git diff --check
- pnpm exec tsx -e goal lifecycle smoke
- pnpm exec tsx -e missing-session fallback smoke
- pnpm exec tsx -e command registry smoke
- pnpm exec tsx -e mutation/profile smoke
- pnpm exec tsx -e omitted totalTokensFresh accounting smoke
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main

Evidence after fix: Formatting, oxlint, whitespace, registry, lifecycle, fallback creation, mutation/profile, and token-freshness probes passed. Final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: Goals persist in core session state, model tools can read/create/complete/block goals, /goal can manage the current session goal, reset clears stale goal baselines, and mutating goal tool results are tracked for retry/replay behavior.

What was not tested: Vitest did not complete in this checkout; a tiny run first stalled before output and later died with allocator failures. Broad pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit is blocked on existing unrelated config/io unique-symbol errors.
target.author: steipete
